records.name: Tenaciousness
records.description: The caster is immune to damage and status effects for 3s. Increases PvE Damage Tolerance by 50% and PvP Damage Tolerance by 25% for 3s when the effect ends. Cannot block certain powerful attacks. Tenaciousness, Salvation, and Barrier Spell effects cannot be applied for 30s if Invincibility stacking is blocked.
records.descriptionFr: Le lanceur is immune à damage et statuseffets pendant 3 s. Augmente résistance aux dégâts PvE de 50% et résistance aux dégâts PvP de 25% pendant 3 s lorsque theeffet ends. Ne bloque pas certaines attaques puissantes.Les effets Tenaciousness, Salvation, et Barrier Spell ne peuvent pas être appliqués pendant 30 s si le cumul d’invincibilité est bloqué.

records.name: Survival Willpower
records.description: Increases the caster's Status Effect Resist by 16.5% . Increases PvE Damage Tolerance by 12% and PvP Damage Tolerance by 6% for 5s when afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear. Increases Status Effect Resist by 10% for 5s when hit while afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear (Max 10 stacks). Damage Tolerance Increase Cooldown: 60s Status Effect Resist Increase Cooldown: 1s

records.name: Murderous Burst
records.description: Grants a stack of Menace for 3s when landing an attack. Removes Menace at 5 stacks and deals - damage to up to 4 enemies within 5m of the caster and reduces enemy Critical Damage Tolerance by 5.5% for 3s.
records.descriptionFr: Confère à charge de Menace pendant 3 s lorsque landing an attack. Removes Menace at 5 charges et deals damage à jusqu’à 4 ennemis à moins de 5 m de le lanceur et réduit enemy Critical résistance aux dégâts de 5.5% pendant 3 s.
